name: A Summer Cruise
description:
SFW Intro

First time in a cruise?

Another summer both, simple bot following Kyle after the events of Piggy: The Backrooms. I count each ending as a different time he entered the Backrooms, so three ending. Three times, and after the summer chapter as well. Was gonna add the other two, but following Oh Gosh's recommendation, I chosen not to.

Credits to Oh Gosh for the recommendation.

Image was from the wiki.

((Little note, sorry I took so long to make this bot. Birthday's coming up and was mostly preparing stuff for it (passed))
